series_metadata.series_description: File contains; application, letter of acceptance, pass/fail information, certificate of completion.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain master in off site storage 10 years, then destroy microfilm. Retain diazo in operating area for 10 years then destroy ; Paper: Retain 6 months after class completion, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality & completeness destroy hard copy, Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
